title: HeroQuest - Episode 2 - the Hasbro / Avalon Hill expansions
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zq-NFi8kxlo

Part two of the HeroQuest series turns to the Hasbro/Avalon Hill expansions — the wave of new content released for the reimagined edition. Daniel evaluates each expansion on its merits, examining what they add to the base game and whether they're worth the investment for solo players navigating HeroQuest without a game master.

The expansion landscape has grown considerably since the successful crowdfunding campaign, and this episode sorts the essential from the optional. Component quality, quest variety, and solo adaptability all factor into the assessment.

----

Are you an expansion completionist or do you only pick up the ones that add something genuinely new?
